issue_title: Fix speaker identity defaults in episode import
issue_body:
**Phase:** Perfect — polishing the core experience

Correct the episode import setup so new speaker sources do not inherit the show or episode name as the speaker name. Speaker fields should start blank or with neutral placeholders, while saved show identity remains visible only as show context. This protects the core setup flow because the creator’s speaker names and social context are the foundation for accurate captions, references, and personalized editing later.

## Acceptance (definition of done)
In the running new-episode import flow, creating an episode from an existing show no longer pre-fills Host, Guest 1, or Guest 2 speaker name inputs with the show or episode title. Speaker role buckets still appear, social-link fields still work per speaker, adding/removing speaker sources still works, the episode still saves back to the show home as a draft, and `node scripts/run-tests.mjs` passes.

---
This is the current active step for this product. The maintainer will only merge a pull request that completes THIS step and demonstrably works. Open a PR that closes this issue.

_Why this step now: The core end-to-end product exists and the maintainer assessment says the UI is good, so the product is in PERFECT rather than MVP. The most important remaining defect is a visible data-wiring bug in the central import flow that can poison speaker identity and social context, so it should be fixed before adding any new capability._
